hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); case "$CMD" in *'uv add'*|*'pip install'*) echo '{"event":"hook.block","hook":"PreToolUse:Bash","detail":"'"$CMD"'"}' | python3 .claude/scripts/emit_event.py & echo 'BLOCKED: 依存関係の追加には明示的な承認が必要です' >&2; exit 2;; esac

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in */.github/*) echo '{"event":"hook.block","hook":"PreToolUse:Edit","detail":"'"$FILE"'"}' | python3 .claude/scripts/emit_event.py & echo 'BLOCKED: CI/CDファイルの変更は明示的な許可が必要です' >&2; exit 2;; esac

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then FMT_OUT=$(uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>&1); CHK_OUT=$(uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>&1); echo "$FMT_OUT$CHK_OUT"; if echo "$FMT_OUT$CHK_OUT" | grep -q 'reformatted\|Fixed'; then echo '{"event":"hook.autofix","hook":"PostToolUse:Edit","detail":"'"$FILE"'"}' | python3 .claude/scripts/emit_event.py & fi; fi
